text: In today's video, we will see how to use server components in Next.js You guys just like this video and write Next.js op in the comment section below Let's go to the video screen Let's roll the intro Alright, so today we will talk about server components Why we should use server components in Next.js Actually, when we worked in React, we saw that we were able to use the use state and use effect very easily We were not having any problem But I want to show you one thing here Let's open in VS Code quickly and make a new project We will create Next app So I will simply run my command npm npx create-next-app-at-the-rate-latest As a Next.js 14 project will be made I am going to make its name I will keep it as my app No script, no slint, no tailwind, no src directory, no app router, no import alias Alright And as soon as it is made, I will show you that when we try to make a use state in our project Or try to use the use effect We will have a problem there And you guys will say why is there a problem? React was better than this But no, Next.js is better Next.js is better because by default, every component in Next.js is a server component So I will simply run code-r myapp Once it is completed, then code-r myapp By which my VS Code will open And I will run npm run dev and start my server And you guys will see when I edit this page.js file I edit the page.js file And I will show you that if I try to make a state in it So I do one thing, I write div here And I will make it JSX JSX And as soon as I write div So you guys see, I will write I am a component And obviously I will go to localhost 3000 Not localhost 5173 Localhost 3000 So you guys see, I am a component will come here You guys will say, yeah yeah, I knew this much, what are you saying? But if I say here I will remove this import, image one I will say import use state from react Or use effect from react And suppose I use use state snippet here And what I will do here Suppose I make one in the name of count And I make count zero And suppose I make a count here Oops, I put it in return by mistake I should put it here and I will say count And as soon as I show you that This is throwing an error You will also be shocked, you will say, why is it throwing an error? The reason for throwing an error is that This is a server component Whereas we have to make it a client component to use use state Now you will say, what is the client component? What is the server component? What is the difference? In Next.js, by default, everything is a server component Which means that Your whole page.js file It will run on the server first And will become HTML and then reach the client And if you want it to run on the client As we were doing in normal react Then you will have to give here use client I will show you use client Okay, so I will write here use client And now it will work perfectly See component is zero Now I will make a button here And I will say that as soon as you click on this button Then you simply run an arrow function What arrow function will you run? Set count to what? Set count to count plus one So you can do this and as soon as you do this I will show you I am refreshing it, why is the button not coming? Why is the button not here? I did not put anything in the button Click me And you see here I am clicking on click me So it is increasing So this 18, 19, 20, 23 It is increasing, very good So here we can make a very basic client page But have you ever done this? Why do we have to write use client To use state and use effect Now see if I lock some console Suppose I lock some console For once we remove the state Remove this state and remove this button And the count we have written We can also remove it I do one thing Remove this count that I have written And what I will do now I will write a console log here Hey I am Harry Suppose I wrote this So when I am using use client The console log of I am Harry Will come here See Hey I am Harry is coming here But as soon as I remove this I will not get it If I remove the use client From the top, what will happen? When I remove the use client First of all, there is a problem here How did you import the use client When this is a server component So see here Our Hey I am Harry did not come So where is this Hey I am Harry logging? This Hey I am Harry is being logged in the server And it is being logged here in the server See Hey I am Harry The more I access this page The more Hey I am Harry will be logged So this is happening Because this page is running on the server side You should know that whenever something is running on the server side It will be logged on the server side console And if something is running on the client It will be logged on the client side Digesting this thing for you people It can be a little difficult if you do not know its use But you understand something like this I can authenticate the user directly here I can do that sensitive work directly here Which I want the user to not be able to see For example If I want to be able to read a file Using the FS module of NodeJS I can import here FS And from FS slash promises And if I do Let A is equal to FS.readfile And if I read the file Which file should I read? If I read .getignore Then I can do this So in total I will show you how this thing Will be done. So I will write here A is equal to await And I can not use await here Because this is a promise No problem I will use A.then I will write here E And I will write here console.log E So I can do something like this And I will show you now That The content of this file will be logged here You can see that the file has been read So I can do here E.toString and as soon as I do E.toString you see that The content of this file has been logged Can I do this if this is a client component? No I can not do this If I do use client here Then I can not do this Then what will happen? Then here it is saying can't resolve FS promises. You can see Can't resolve FS promises because This whole code Where is it running? It is running In the browser and in the browser It did not get this thing. So now Understand the difference between server and client Now understand that whenever We make a component by default It is a server component but As soon as I write here use client Everything runs on the client side Next.js is a Full stack framework You can write front end and back end You can write front end and back end If you do not understand the application Then you do not worry In the coming videos When we have to use server component When we have to use client component We are going to see this Now suppose I have a file here Data.json And suppose I have some data I will do one thing I will go to json placeholder And I will bring some sample data From there. So I just need some sample data So that I can Copy it. This is my json I have pasted it here Ctrl A, Ctrl B So I have this json. Now I can use this json I will do one thing I will remove this array And I will use this json directly I will right click And format data Or let's do one thing Let's leave this array And here what we will do We can import this data.json We can import this data.json So to read this I have to use it like a server component Otherwise I will get error From FS promises So I want to make those components Server component which are using sensitive information Which are taking connection from database Which are authenticating the user Which I want to treat as back end And once Whatever we are rendering here That will become our html and will go to browser So here The logic which you will write Which I have written here in function After executing that logic You will get to see this html in browser Means here you can write Back end logic if you have server component But if you have client component Then you have to be very careful Because whatever you do in client component That will be available in client side And what to do when You will get to know from experience So I hope you understood server component Do a very simple thing You have to write use client If you want to make any component client component And you can use it here One more thing you can do Assume that you want to make only navbar And you want to use use state in it So you can make only navbar component as use client And you can embed it in server component To do this You can make a folder here called components Assume that I can make it on outer side Or in outer most Portion of directory Components Slash navbar.jsx You don't have to do this You can just do jsx And after doing this We will do rafce And I will write navbar here And I will make it client component So I can write here use client And I can import it here Even if it is not client component I can import navbar And I can use navbar here I will say return navbar in div And like this I can import navbar Navbar is a client component Page.js is a server component I have used client component in server component And you can do this very easily No tension You will not get any error We need to do this in big projects When we need to take a particular portion of logic And in that We need to do use state, use effect Which can be done in client component So if you want to do something like this Then you take out that portion And make it client component It is simple logic And you will find this very easy When we will see its application And when we will see How components are separated If you have not accessed the playlist of sigma Then do access it And do write a review in the comment Thank you so much guys And I will see you next time
